_doc: Suppress findings that match these rules + conditions. Match fields are AND-ed within an entry. To disable all suppression: scanner.py --no-allowlist.

suppressions.comment: McAfee WebAdvisor / WPS use cmd.exe as native-messaging bridge to Edge/Chrome.
VS Code auto-updater downloads its installer to %TEMP% before running.
VS Code installer's inner setup runs from is-*.tmp directory.
